title: Structured MADR Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for validating Structured MADR YAML frontmatter

title.description: Short descriptive title for the decision

examples: Decision to adopt PostgreSQL as the primary database for the application

updated.description: Date the ADR was last modified (ISO 8601)

author.description: The author or team responsible for the decision

project.description: The project this decision applies to

technologies.description: Technologies referenced or affected by this decision

x-superseded-by.description: MIF: filename of the ADR that supersedes this one. Projected to a MIF 'supersedes' relationship. Use when status is 'superseded'.

id.description: MIF: stable identifier for this decision (UUID or slug). If absent, the projector synthesizes urn:mif:smadr:<project>:<file-slug>.

conceptType.description: MIF: cognitive-triad type. ADRs are semantic (knowledge). Distinct from the MADR 'type' (const 'adr').

namespace.description: MIF: hierarchical namespace. If absent, derived as _semantic/decisions/<category-slug>.

summary.description: MIF (L3): short summary. If absent, the projector uses 'description'.

relationships.description: MIF (L2): typed relationships {type (kebab-case), target}. Usually derived from 'related'/'x-superseded-by'; author overrides accepted. Deep-validated against the MIF schema after projection.

entities.description: MIF (L2): EntityReferences. Usually derived from 'technologies'; author overrides accepted. Deep-validated against the MIF schema after projection.

temporal.description: MIF (L2/L3): temporal metadata. Usually derived from created/updated/status; deep-validated after projection.

provenance.description: MIF (L3): W3C-PROV provenance. Usually derived from author/project; deep-validated after projection.

citations.description: MIF (L3): citations. Usually extracted from body Links; author overrides accepted. Deep-validated after projection.

additionalProperties.description: Custom extension fields should be prefixed with 'x-'

examples.title: Use PostgreSQL for Primary Storage
examples.description: Decision to adopt PostgreSQL as the primary database for the application
examples.author: Architecture Team
